testcase.name: test_chains_dont_return_placeholder_urls

failure.message:
AssertionError: Found placehold.co URL: https://placehold.co/512x512/6b21a8/white?text=Comic+Avatar assert 'placehold.co' not in 'https://pla...Comic+Avatar'
'placehold.co' is contained here: https://placehold.co/512x512/6b21a8/white?text=Comic+Avatar ? ++++++++++++

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_trust_repair_iteration293.py:231: in test_chains_dont_return_placeholder_urls assert "placehold.co" not in preview_url, f"Found placehold.co URL: {preview_url}" E AssertionError: Found placehold.co URL: https://placehold.co/512x512/6b21a8/white?text=Comic+Avatar E assert 'placehold.co' not in 'https://pla...Comic+Avatar' E E 'placehold.co' is contained here: E https://placehold.co/512x512/6b21a8/white?text=Comic+Avatar E ? ++++++++++++
